title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 16–16, this part focuses on Law, Unknown person #13, Zoro, King as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: How!? He's not even making contact...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Zoro, Traf, thanks for covering me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: leave the rest to me! I'll beat him no matter what!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 8 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
